projectDescription: A third-semester university programming course repository covering object-oriented programming concepts in Java, Python, and JavaScript, including OOP fundamentals, exception handling, file I/O, database access with psycopg2, and browser-based mini-games.
keyFeatures: Java OOP: inheritance, polymorphism, abstract classes, interfaces, casting, and JavaBeans
Java exception handling: checked/unchecked exceptions, custom exception classes, try-catch-finally
Java console applications: interactive menus with Scanner and switch statements
Python exception handling with custom exception classes and else/finally blocks
Python file I/O: reading, writing, and context managers
Python PostgreSQL access via psycopg2: CRUD, transactions, and connection pooling
Python DAO pattern: Persona, Conexion, PersonaDao classes with PostgreSQL
JavaScript OOP using ES6 classes, inheritance, and polymorphism
JavaScript arrow functions, callbacks, setTimeout, and setInterval
Browser-based games: N-Queens solver, Towers of Hanoi, Rock-Paper-Scissors, Knight's Tour
Interactive clock app with dynamic backgrounds using setInterval
publicApiSurface: Java: DispositivoEntrada, Teclado, Raton, Monitor, Computadora, Orden classes (mundopc package)
Java: FiguraGeometrica abstract class with dibujar() abstract method
Java: IAccesoDatos interface (insertar, listar, actualizar, eliminar)
Java: Persona class with CRUD menu (Clase 10)
JavaScript: actualizarReloj() — live clock with setInterval
